landing.title: Less chaos. More teaching.
landing.description: TeacherHelper helps you organize examples cleanly, build tests faster and manage teaching content together in everyday school life — modern, clear and without unnecessary clutter.

points.p1: Build tests from examples in just a few clicks
points.p2: Reuse content over time instead of doing everything twice
points.p3: Manage everything together with colleagues in one school space

trust.t1: Faster workflow instead of material chaos
trust.t3: Built with print, PDF and Word in mind

visual.poolTitle: Your example pool at a glance
visual.poolText: Find tasks faster, combine content in a smart way and create clean tests with only a few clicks.

mock.title1: Calculate the missing values in the ratio task

features.title: Built for real lesson preparation
features.subtitle: Not overloaded, but practical. TeacherHelper helps exactly where planning, collecting material and creating tests usually become frustrating.

f1.title: Organize examples centrally
f1.text: Store tasks in one place instead of losing them across folders, chats and old files.

f2.title: Filter and find quickly
f2.text: Find content by type, topic or focus instantly when you need it for the next test.

f3.title: Create tests much faster
f3.text: Build complete tests from existing examples in just a few steps instead of starting from zero every time.

f4.title: Clean preview for export and print
f4.text: Check everything before printing and keep a clear output for PDF, Word and print.

f5.title: Collaboration inside your school team
f5.text: Work with colleagues in a shared school environment and keep content where it is actually needed.

f6.title: Made for real schools
f6.text: No unnecessary feature clutter, just a workflow that actually fits teachers, departments and daily school life.

pricing.title: A plan for every stage
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, work more professionally with Pro or use TeacherHelper as a shared platform for your school.

free.subtitle: Perfect for trying it out and small setups.

pro.subtitle: For active teachers who regularly prepare material and tests.

school.subtitle: For schools, departments and shared management across the whole staff.

final.title: Turn material chaos into one clean workflow.
final.text: Start for free and see how much faster lesson preparation can become with a clear interface.

exampleDialog.selectionGapHelp: For selection gaps, the description is shown directly above the gap – like in a classic gap-fill task.
exampleDialog.freeTextGapHelp: For free-text gaps, the description is shown small and left-aligned above the line.
exampleDialog.taskImageHelp: Upload the image for the task here. The preview is shown directly on the right.
exampleDialog.solutionImageHelp: Optionally, you can also store a solution image.
